offer: For legal billing clerks processing 10–20 invoices/month, overdue invoices cause cash flow gaps. We monitor client billing deadlines and flag overdue invoices instead of manual tracking of billing deadlines.
problem: Overdue invoices lead to cash flow gaps.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for legal billing clerks
Share insights on Indie Hackers forums
DM outreach to legal billing clerks with demo video
Engage in community forums for billing tools
try_it: Let users try manual invoice tracking on 1-3 invoices
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Create templates for common invoice types
Set default reminder schedules for deadlines
Allow CSV import for existing invoices
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
